name: Now playing
description: Album art + track info. State pushed by frame-core via WebSocket when Home Assistant reports a media_player playing.

theme.description: Color scheme. Auto follows the device/OS preference.

font_family.description: Typeface for track title, artist, and album.

accent_color.description: Progress bar accent when accent_source is custom. Leave empty for theme default.

layout.description: How album art and track metadata are arranged.

accent_source.description: Progress bar color: sampled from album art, theme primary, or accent_color.

blur_background.description: Show a blurred album-art backdrop behind the panel.

blur_amount.description: Backdrop blur radius in pixels when blur_background is enabled.

show_progress.description: Show an elapsed-time progress bar under the track info.
